sections.paragraph:
Original: מעה

Transliteration: mê‛eh

Phonetic: may-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. internal organs, inward parts, bowels, intestines, belly
    1. inward parts
    2. digestive organs
    3. organs of procreation, womb
    4. place of emotions or distress or love (figuratively)
    5. external belly

Origin: from an unused root probably meaning to be soft

TWOT entry: 1227a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
